content.full_text:
California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
steve Vaccariello, Treasurer 
Frank Hill for Assembly committee 
2036 N. Beachwood Dr., #10 
Los Angeles, 
CA 
90068-3432 
Dear Mr. Vaccariello: 
June 10, 1986 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
FPPC No. A-86-155 
Thank you for your letter of May 4, 1986, concerning the 
campaign reporting provisions of the Political Reform Act. 
As requested, I am enclosing the 1986 "Information Manual on 
Campaign Disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act." 
For 
your information, the manual has been available from your filing 
officers for several months now. 
You have asked a number of questions which I will respond to 
in the order presented in your letter. 
Whenever there is a change in the information contained in a 
statement of organization, an amended Form 410 must be filed 
within ten days. 
In amending a statement of Organization, it is 
not necessary to complete the entire form. 
To report the change 
of address for a committee treasurer, indicate that you are filing 
an amendment, provide the identification number of the committee, 
include the name of the committee, the new address for the 
treasurer and sign the form. 
During the seven week period when you will not be available to 
carry out the responsibilities of treasurer, you must designate 
someone as treasurer and amend the committee's statement of 
organization, Form 410, to reflect the change in treasurers. 
On 
the amended Form 410, or in a cover letter, indicate that the 
change in treasurer is temporary, and that upon your return, the 
Form 410 will again be amended to show you as the committee's 
treasurer. 
The May and October pre-election statements must be delivered 
in person or mailed through the u.s. Postal Service's guaranteed 
overnight delivery service. 
There are, however, some cities where 
428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 ~ Sacramento CA 95804~0807 • (916)322-5660 


Mr. Vaccariello 
June 10, 1986 
Page Two 
the u.s. Postal Service cannot guarantee 24 hour service. 
If this 
is the case, then any guaranteed overnight delivery service may be 
used. 
I hope the above answers your questions. 
Please do not 
hesitate to contact me if you have additional questions. 
Sincerel~ 
r/ 
n\cc~~.Vvv\ ~~.~ "-
Mary AJl

Enclosures: 
Form 410, Statement of Organization, 
1986 "Information Manual on Campaign 
Disclosure Provisions of the Political 
Reform Act" 


s ~~ A~ db 
. 
May 4, 1986 
State of California 
Fair Political Practices Commission 
428 J Street #800 
Sacramento, CA 
95804 
To Whom it May Concern: 
Please advise and assist on the following matters: 
1) 
I have not yet received the 1986 Information Manual on Campaign Dis-
closure Provisions. 
Please send a copy as soon as possible (if, of course, 
its been printed.) 
I'm afraid I might have missed it. 
2) 
I will be changing my permanent address soon. 
What form, if any, is 
necessary to officially change a committees' treasurers' address? 
3) 
In a couple of months I will be in traing with the U.S. Air Force and 
out of California for about 7 weeks - possibly through a filing period. 
What 
must officially be done to temporarily turn over the treasurer's responsibilities 
to another person? 
4) 
Regarding the provlslon that requires the May and October pre-election 
statements to be sent by overnight mail -- Is Federal Express OK? 
It is so 
much more convenient than the Post Office. 
Thank you very much, in advance, for your attention and help. 
FRANK HILL FOR ASSEMBLY COMMITTEE 
#820144 
2036 N. Beachwood Drive #10 
Los Angeles, CA 
90068-3432 
Day Phone: 213-664-1 
Sincerely, 
"~-~ 
Steve Vaccariello 
Treasurer 


TO: 
JOHN L. 
BOB L.
